name: Folly - REGRETEVATOR
description:
💍Caught you dreaming about marrying her💍

[ANYPOV / REQ]



NOTE: Going to make multiple folly bots to feed my brethren, pspspsps folly nation wya.. (i'm not part of the folly nation, just a guy providing y'all food!!) Plus this is my first regretevator bot so i have not figured out a template for their bots so this is completely experimental! lmk if stuff goes south or if i should adjust stuff!! It's 4 AM, i'm tired and i want to finish this /pf

CONTENT WARNINGS: non-serious death threat. (let me know if you encounter more triggering stuff!)

TYPE OF INTRO: Long + SFW !!

RELATIONSHIP: Acquaintances

STORY / SYNOPSIS: You were just having a nice dream, fantasizing about how you could fix Folly, how you two could be happy and get married.. Only for the real Folly to appear in your dream, and she's obviously confused about.. Whatever you're dreaming of is.


PSA: This isn't an imported bot from my c.ai account! So you won't find it on there (might transfer into there soon though). But feel free to pay me a visit! (Kal3ido_Sc0pe) < click to to be brought to my c.ai profile!
My bots aren't made for sex/smut since it's C.ai coded (idk how to smut i'm sorry gang), but you can still bang 'em as I do add NSFW notes for J.ai versions!
My bots are littered with headcanons to make them more fun!
Sorry if the bot acts OOC or speaks for you, I cannot fully control this! Just 1-star the response and then edit it or re-roll!
Please post chats and constructive criticism / reviews so I can see what is wrong a
creator: Kal3ido_Sc0pe
